---
title: "Used Car Pricing Research"
subtitle: "Marketing Research Presentation"
author: "Isaiah Kirkpatrick"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---


::: {.cell}

:::


## Research Purpose

- Analyze factors connected to used car resale prices
- Focus on mileage, age, brand, model, and reputation
- Use data visualization to communicate pricing patterns

## Research Question

**How do mileage, vehicle age, brand, model, and brand reputation influence used car pricing?**

## Data and Method

- Data type: sample used car listing data
- Main variables: price, mileage, year, brand, model, reputation score
- Analysis method: visual comparison and trend analysis
- Purpose: identify visible pricing patterns

## Key Metrics


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}


|Average Price |Average Mileage | Average Age|Highest Price |Lowest Price |
|:-------------|:---------------|-----------:|:-------------|:------------|
|$22,161.67    |52,800          |         5.4|$29,995       |$15,495      |


:::
:::

## Business Takeaway

Fill in 3–5 bullets:

- The strongest pricing pattern appears to be __________.
- Buyers could use this information to __________.
- Sellers or dealerships could use this information to __________.
- This connects to marketing analytics because __________.

## Skills Demonstrated

- Marketing research
- Data visualization
- Business analytics
- Consumer behavior analysis
- Quarto Reveal.js presentation development
- Data-based communication

## Final Reflection

Fill in 3–5 sentences:

This project helped me understand __________. The most useful part of the analysis was __________ because __________. In a business setting, this type of analysis could help __________.

include-after-body:
<script>
  // htmlwidgets need to know to resize themselves when slides are shown/hidden.
  // Fire the "slideenter" event (handled by htmlwidgets.js) when the current
  // slide changes (different for each slide format).
  (function () {
    // dispatch for htmlwidgets
    function fireSlideEnter() {
      const event = window.document.createEvent("Event");
      event.initEvent("slideenter", true, true);
      window.document.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    function fireSlideChanged(previousSlide, currentSlide) {
      fireSlideEnter();

      // dispatch for shiny
      if (window.jQuery) {
        if (previousSlide) {
          window.jQuery(previousSlide).trigger("hidden");
        }
        if (currentSlide) {
          window.jQuery(currentSlide).trigger("shown");
        }
      }
    }

    // hookup for slidy
    if (window.w3c_slidy) {
      window.w3c_slidy.add_observer(function (slide_num) {
        // slide_num starts at position 1
        fireSlideChanged(null, w3c_slidy.slides[slide_num - 1]);
      });
    }

  })();
</script>
